title: Software update - background DFU for Language update
scenario: Language update via DFU completes successfully when Poly Studio Mobile app is placed in the background
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a headset with a language update available is connected.
2. Navigate to Dev Settings screen and initiate the language update (DFU).
3. Immediately after starting the update, put the app in the background (e.g., press Home or switch to another app).
4. Wait for the DFU process to complete.
5. Bring the app back to the foreground and verify the language update status.
expected: DFU completes successfully and the language is changed correctly on the headset.
